title: AI-Powered Internal Operations Platform for Agricultural Procurement

client.name: AgriPro
client.signals: Established multi-state business with operational scale issues; seeks to replace manual spreadsheet/email workflows with centralized platform; values AI-powered intelligence on real business problems (document processing, data quality flagging)

summary: AgriPro is an established agricultural procurement business managing field inspections, lab testing, approvals, and warehouse logistics across multiple states, today via spreadsheets, email, and manual reporting. They need a single, internal, role-based operations platform that centralizes procurement campaigns, inspection workflows, laboratory grading, multi-stage approvals, warehouse allocation, and document management, with AI layered on top for OCR, document classification, and anomaly detection to flag data quality issues.

explicit_requirements.text: Secure user authentication with role-based access
Operational dashboards for different user roles
Reporting with PDF and Excel export
OCR for extracting information from laboratory certificates
Anomaly detection to identify unusual inspection values for review

implicit_needs: Scalability across multiple states and teams
Data integrity and audit trail for compliance/commodity trading
Performance with dense datasets (field inspections, procurement records)
Mobile usability for field personnel conducting inspections
Integration of AI/ML as operational decision support (not cosmetic)
domain: Agricultural procurement operations, commodity trading, supply chain coordination, internal workflow automation
success_signals: Demo shows OCR live-extracting lab certificate data, with anomaly detection flagging out-of-band values
Role-aware dashboards and workflows convince them the platform understands their ops (procurement / quality / warehouse / management views are distinct and purposeful)
Multi-stage approval workflow is clearly rendered and functional
Data is dense, searchable, exportable; feels like a real operations tool not a template
Design is industrial/trustworthy, not generic SaaS; shows familiarity with agricultural/commodity-trading aesthetics
red_flags: No budget or timeline stated; estimate is high-scope custom build
18 explicit feature requirements + 7 deliverables create scope-creep risk; must ruthlessly prioritize hero + 2 pillars vs. realistic demo cap
AI claims (OCR, classification, anomaly detection) MUST run honestly (client-side or thin blueprint); faked screenshots will fail credibility
Internal ops tool, not customer-facing; design must prioritize power-user density + mobile field capability over marketing aesthetics

demo_concepts.name: AgriPro Operations Console (Full Platform)
demo_concepts.what: End-to-end internal operations platform showcasing field inspections, lab grading with OCR/anomaly detection, multi-stage approvals, role-based dashboards, document library, and warehouse tracking on realistic agricultural procurement data.
demo_concepts.hero_feature: OCR lab certificate image, extract grading fields, auto-classify document type, populate inspection record, anomaly detector flags unusual moisture/aflatoxin/foreign-matter values for review
demo_concepts.why_wins: Demonstrates honest AI (OCR + classification + anomaly detection run client-side with seeded fallback); shows operational spine (campaign board, approval workflows, role dashboards); proves the developer understands 'AI-powered solutions that solve real business problems' in their domain

demo_concepts.name: Procurement-to-Warehouse Campaign Board
demo_concepts.what: Kanban-style board visualizing a procurement campaign through field inspection, lab testing, multi-stage approval, and warehouse allocation stages; shows the approval workflow and role transitions.
demo_concepts.hero_feature: Cards move through approval stages, role-specific approval buttons activate/deactivate based on user role, audit trail shows who approved and when
demo_concepts.why_wins: Proves operational understanding of their multi-stage workflow and role complexity; Kanban is familiar to operations teams and shows the platform as a tool for coordination

demo_concepts.name: Role-Based Dashboards with Reporting
demo_concepts.what: Distinct dashboards for procurement, quality/lab, warehouse, and management roles; each shows role-specific KPIs, pending actions, and a live PDF/Excel export of sample reports.
demo_concepts.hero_feature: Single data set, four radically different dashboard views; export generates real PDF/Excel files client can download
demo_concepts.why_wins: Shows scalability to multi-role operations; reporting export (PDF/Excel) is a required deliverable and seeing it work live is credible
